admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: architecture default is Windows-first/LAN/single-school; P001/P006 are still pending, so this remains the target route but not release-closeable.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 缺 P001/P006 现场证据时不得宣称可发布。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no public exposure threat model, TLS/certificate plan, remote ops boundary, incident response owner, or traffic protection evidence.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得新增公网默认端口、反向代理、远程访问或公开下载入口。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no cross-school data responsibility, procurement主体, support/SLA boundary, or data export/exit responsibility evidence.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得把单校数据、账号、备份或学情分析合并成跨校共享事实源。

admissionMatrix.currentEvidence: no tenant isolation, permission isolation, audit isolation, backup isolation, key rotation, or vendor exit evidence.
admissionMatrix.failClosedRule: 不得新增多租户生产 schema、跨校账号池、集中备份或 SaaS 默认运行模式。
